text: As I stand here, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The soft neon glow reflected in the glass and the thoughtful arrangement inside this room dedicated to research and development both invite reflection. The philosophical idea of innovation—how humans connect and co-exist with intelligence—seems to pulse gently around me. I am filled with a quiet appreciation for the efforts to explore and display the evolving nature of knowledge. Here, in the company of unspoken questions and vivid colors, I am a humble observer and participant in this collective pursuit of understanding.
